headline: Interparfums Brand Strategy: Driving Consistent Growth Ahead
summary: IPAR leverages a balanced brand portfolio and expansion strategy to deliver steady growth and strengthen its position in the global fragrance market.

raw.headline: Interparfums Brand Strategy: Driving Consistent Growth Ahead

headline: Tired of AI and Oil? Buy the Robot.
summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) is currently hovering around the $450 mark, a level that has historically acted as a psychological and technical floor. For an investor, the question isn't just "is it cheap?" (it almost never is), but "is the premium still justified?”.

raw.headline: Tired of AI and Oil? Buy the Robot.

headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Ralph Lauren (RL) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Rally?
summary: Investors may be wondering if Ralph Lauren at around US$349.53 is still offering value after a strong run, or if expectations are already baked into the price. The stock has returned 1.6% over the last 7 days and 3.3% over the last 30 days, while longer term performance sits at 93.9% over 1 year, 205.0% over 3 years and 211.5% over 5 years, with a year-to-date return of a 3.6% decline. Recent headlines have focused on Ralph Lauren as a key name in the premium apparel space, with investors...
